# Risk Register Template

Maintain one risk register per project. Update the table at least weekly during the delivery sync.

---

**Project:** <!-- Project name -->
**Last Updated:** <!-- YYYY-MM-DD -->

---

| ID | Description | Impact | Likelihood | Owner | Mitigation | Status | Last Updated |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| R-001 | <!-- Brief risk description --> | High / Med / Low | High / Med / Low | <!-- Name --> | <!-- Mitigation plan --> | Active / Mitigated / Resolved | <!-- YYYY-MM-DD --> |
| R-002 | | | | | | | |

**Impact / Likelihood key:**
- **High** – significant effect on timeline, scope, or quality
- **Med** – moderate effect, manageable with attention
- **Low** – minor effect, monitor only

---

> Review and update this register at every weekly delivery sync. Escalate High-impact / High-likelihood risks to the PM immediately.
